name: b2b-marketplace
description: B2B Marketplace monorepo — frontend + backend test orchestration

scripts.install:all: npm ci --prefix server && npm ci --prefix client
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix client && npm run lint --prefix server
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:ci: npm run lint && npm run build:frontend && npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:e2e:ci
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage --prefix server && npm run test:coverage --prefix client
